query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS treasury_transactions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  treasuryFundId INT NOT NULL,
  transactionType ENUM('deposit', 'withdrawal', 'transfer_in', 'transfer_out', 'allocation', 'adjustment') NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  tokenAmount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  sourceType ENUM('member_reinvestment', 'donation', 'grant', 'revenue_share', 'investment_return', 'transfer', 'adjustment') NOT NULL,
  sourceId INT,
  destinationType ENUM('member_benefit', 'development_grant', 'stability_support', 'operating_expense', 'transfer', 'investment') DEFAULT NULL,
  destinationId INT,
  description TEXT,
  balanceBefore DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  balanceAfter DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  processedBy INT,
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_fund (treasuryFundId),
  INDEX idx_type (transactionType),
  INDEX idx_date (createdAt)
);

  transactionType ENUM('deposit', 'withdrawal', 'transfer_in', 'transfer_out', 'allocation', 'adjustment') NOT NULL,

  sourceType ENUM('member_reinvestment', 'donation', 'grant', 'revenue_share', 'investment_return', 'transfer', 'adjustment') NOT NULL,
  sourceId INT,
  destinationType ENUM('member_benefit', 'development_grant', 'stability_support', 'operating_expense', 'transfer', 'investment') DEFAULT NULL,
  destinationId INT,
  description TEXT,
  balanceBefore DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  balanceAfter DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  processedBy INT,
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_fund (treasuryFundId),
  INDEX idx_type (transactionType),
  INDEX idx_date (createdAt)
);
